page.title: Present Simple: Negatives
page.subtitle_html: Present Simple: Negatives — do not, does not, don't, doesn't і базова форма дієслова.

blocks.body: {"level":"A1–A2","intro":"У запереченнях Present Simple ми ставимо do not / does not перед основним дієсловом.","rules":[{"label":"I / You / We / They don't","color":"emerald","text":"З цими підметами використовуй do not або don't.","example":"I don't work on Sundays."},{"label":"He / She / It doesn't","color":"blue","text":"З he / she / it використовуй does not або doesn't.","example":"She doesn't like coffee."},{"label":"Base verb after do / does","color":"amber","text":"Після do / does дієслово повертається до базової форми.","example":"He doesn't go, not he doesn't goes."}]}

{"title":"1. Формула заперечення","intro":"Запам'ятай дві основні моделі.","items":[{"label":"I / You / We / They","title":"do not + V1","subtitle":"I do not work here. / We don't live near the station."},{"label":"He / She / It","title":"does not + V1","subtitle":"He does not play tennis. / She doesn't drive."},{"label":"Full forms","title":"do not / does not","subtitle":"Повні форми звучать трохи формальніше або чіткіше."},{"label":"Short forms","title":"don't / doesn't","subtitle":"У розмові скорочення вживаються дуже часто."}]}

{"title":"2. Як це працює в реченні","sections":[{"label":"Звички","color":"emerald","description":"Скажи, чого ти зазвичай не робиш.","examples":[{"en":"I don't drink coffee at night.","ua":"Я не п'ю каву вночі."},{"en":"They don't walk to school.","ua":"Вони не ходять до школи пішки."}]},{"label":"He / She / It","color":"blue","description":"У третій особі однини використовуй doesn't.","examples":[{"en":"He doesn't watch TV in the morning.","ua":"Він не дивиться телевізор вранці."},{"en":"My sister doesn't eat meat.","ua":"Моя сестра не їсть м'яса."}]},{"label":"Позитивне vs негативне","color":"amber","description":"Порівняй ствердження і заперечення: у негативі дієслово стоїть у V1.","examples":[{"en":"She works here. → She doesn't work here.","ua":"Після doesn't форма works стає work."},{"en":"We play on Fridays. → We don't play on Fridays.","ua":"Після don't форма не змінюється."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Ствердження і заперечення","intro":"У запереченні додаємо do / does + not.","rows":[{"en":"I work on Sundays.","ua":"I don't work on Sundays.","note":"do + not + base verb"},{"en":"They like spicy food.","ua":"They don't like spicy food.","note":"don't + like"},{"en":"He plays tennis.","ua":"He doesn't play tennis.","note":"doesn't + play"},{"en":"She goes by bus.","ua":"She doesn't go by bus.","note":"doesn't + go"}],"warning":"Не кажи He doesn't goes."}

{"title":"4. Типові помилки","items":[{"label":"Помилка 1","color":"rose","title":"Брати don't з he / she / it.","wrong":"❌ He don't like tea.","right":"✅ He doesn't like tea."},{"label":"Помилка 2","color":"amber","title":"Залишати -s після doesn't.","wrong":"❌ She doesn't goes to school by bus.","right":"✅ She doesn't go to school by bus."},{"label":"Помилка 3","color":"sky","title":"Ставити not без do.","wrong":"❌ I not work on Sundays.","right":"✅ I don't work on Sundays."}]}

{"title":"5. Короткий підсумок","items":["Заперечення в Present Simple = do / does + not + V1.","З I / you / we / they використовуй don't або do not.","З he / she / it використовуй doesn't або does not.","Після do / does завжди бери базову форму дієслова.","Типова помилка: doesn't goes замість doesn't go."]}

{"title":"Уроки Present Simple","items":[{"label":"Forms and Use","url":"/theory/present-simple/present-simple-forms","current":false},{"label":"Negatives","url":"/theory/present-simple/present-simple-negatives","current":true},{"label":"Questions and Short Answers","url":"/theory/present-simple/present-simple-questions","current":false},{"label":"Adverbs of Frequency","url":"/theory/present-simple/present-simple-adverbs-of-frequency","current":false}]}
